page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.8xlarge is a general-purpose server instance belonging to the ecs.g9ae family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and utilizes KVM virtualization. The instance features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 32 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include any local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance as a balanced option for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of hyperthreading. Tradeoffs include the complete absence of local NVMe storage and hardware acceleration. This profile is suitable for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded application servers, containerized microservices, and medium-scale database hosting relying on network storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.8xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor on the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, operating at 2.25 GHz. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Utilizing KVM virtualization, this instance provides dedicated CPU allocation, making it suitable for workloads that require predictable compute performance without hyperthreading overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.8xlarge is a general-purpose server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without hyperthreading.

tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core AMD EPYC server offering a balanced memory-to-core ratio and sixteen gigabits per second network bandwidth.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses
No local storage or integrated GPU accelerators included
KVM-based virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation
Suitable for general-purpose applications, container nodes, and web servers
